heading: Facilitating discussions regarding acquisition of space hardware, technology, and services from former Soviet Union
label: 5871 Facilitating discussions regarding acquisition of space hardware, technology, and services from former Soviet Union

children.heading: Expedited review
children.label: a Expedited review
children.text: Any request for a license or other approval described in subsection (c) that is submitted to any United States Government agency by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration, any of its contractors, or any other person shall be considered on an expedited basis by that agency and any other agency involved in an applicable interagency review process.

children.heading: Notice to Congress if license denied
children.label: b Notice to Congress if license denied
children.text: If any United States Government agency denies a request for a license or other approval described in subsection (c), that agency shall immediately notify the designated congressional committees. Each such notification shall include a statement of the reasons for the denial.
United States space projects that have been approved by the Congress, or
